usage: read_path_descriptions [-help] <filename> [-hpin] [-path_type {end summary full full_clock end_slack_only summary_slack_only}] [-retime {aocv ssta path_slew_propagation aocv_path_slew_propagation waveform_propagation}]

options.name: -hpin
options.description: Prints all hierarchical crossings of an arc under hpin column in report_timing table

options.name: -path_type
options.description: {end summary full full_clock end_slack_only summary_slack_only} The path_type option lets you choose the format of the report by path type

options.name: -retime
options.description: {aocv ssta path_slew_propagation aocv_path_slew_propagation waveform_propagation} Reanalyzes the specified set of paths using the specified method
